name: better-changelog
description: Self-hostable, one-click-deploy changelog app that drafts entries from merged GitHub PRs. Runs on Cloudflare Workers + D1.

scripts.deploy: opennextjs-cloudflare build && npm run db:migrations:apply && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy -- --keep-vars

CHANGELOG_REPO.description: The `owner/repo` of **this** changelog app fork. Example: `yourname/better-changelog`. Used to gate access to `/admin` and `/setup` — only GitHub users with write access to this repo can sign in. Everything else (tracked repo, prod branch, webhook URL) is configured via the in-app `/setup` GUI after deploy.

GITHUB_CLIENT_ID.description: Client ID of your GitHub OAuth App. Create one at [github.com/settings/developers](https://github.com/settings/developers). The **Authorization callback URL** must be `<your-app-url>/api/auth/callback`.

GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Client Secret of your GitHub OAuth App.

SESSION_SECRET.description: Random string used to sign sessions. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`.
